title: Heal Happy Ghast
description: A datapack/mod that heals Happy Ghasts by 2 hearts when you throw a snowball at them.
body:
![Heal Happy Ghasts Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef81329efc1470e20c19c4b4fcd0770be277718b.png)

## **Quick & Simple!**

- **This datapack/mod allows you to heal your happy ghasts by 2 hearts whenever a snowball hits them. ❄️**
- **You can throw snowballs at it while sitting on it, while standing away, or whenever you want. 👍**
- **Heart particles appear to show that it's been healed. 💖**
- **There's a cooldown of a second between healings. ⌛**


### To Do:
- Different effects other than healing, such as speed
- Being able to change the amount of healing
